name: Golden Mustard Embroidered Kurta
description: Lightweight golden yellow kurta with neckline embroidery. Ideal for Haldi, casual wedding rituals or pujas.
stylistNotes: Wear with white pajama and kolhapuris for a comfortable ethnic style.

name: Sunshine Yellow Embroidered Kurta Set
description: Traditional yellow kurta with detailed embroidery and dupatta, a vibrant pick for Haldi celebrations.
stylistNotes: Best styled with leather sandals and subtle accessories.
materialCare: Hand wash separately or dry clean.

name: Pastel Yellow Designer Kurta
description: Designed for grandeur, this outfit is ideal for high-profile events.
stylistNotes: Add a stole or dupatta to elevate the traditional vibe.
materialCare: Hand wash separately. Do not bleach.

name: Beige Yellow Jacket Kurta Set
description: An elegant ensemble designed to make heads turn at any celebration.
stylistNotes: Combine with a turban or safa for a complete royal look.
materialCare: Avoid using harsh detergents on embellishments.
